context: Tests whether the agent produces a page critical review using the exact required output structure, includes correctly weighted scores across all six dimensions, provides actual code or copy for P0/P1 fixes, and checks subscription-box specific patterns.

checklist.name: P0 section present
checklist.description: Output contains a P0 section (ship-blockers or fix before next push) — even if empty, it must be present and labeled P0

checklist.name: P1 section present
checklist.description: Output contains a P1 section (weakening conversion or fix this week) labeled P1

checklist.name: P2 section present
checklist.description: Output contains a P2 section (polish) labeled P2

checklist.name: Verdict section
checklist.description: Output contains a Verdict section summarizing the page's overall state in 1-2 sentences

checklist.name: Strengths section
checklist.description: Output contains a Strengths section listing specific things that are working on the page

checklist.name: Scores table with 6 dimensions
checklist.description: Output contains a scores table covering all six dimensions: Hierarchy, Copy, Conversion, Trust, Mobile, Technical — each scored out of 5

checklist.name: Weighted total in scores
checklist.description: Scores table includes a weighted total row (out of 100)

checklist.name: Concrete fixes for P0/P1
checklist.description: For at least one P0 or P1 issue, the review provides actual alternative copy (2-3 headline alternatives written out) OR actual code — not just 'improve the headline'

checklist.name: Subscription box patterns checked
checklist.description: Review explicitly checks for at least 2 of: tier picker without prices, missing cancel-anytime near CTA, generic hero copy, recent drops gallery without context, social proof above fold

checklist.name: Issue format [Issue] — [why] — [fix]
checklist.description: Issues in P0/P1/P2 sections follow the format: issue description — why it matters — fix (three-part dashes format)
